selection_notes: Candidates curated from sources 01-15. Many are micro-decisions within larger episodes; the curation step will collapse related micro-decisions into single CDM-rich incidents and select 25-28 with the highest CDM yield (clear alternatives, recoverable cues, distinctive reasoning traces).
